name: Security Gate — Lambda Python
description: Verify no secrets or IAM wildcards are introduced when writing Python or YAML files

then.prompt: Before writing this file, verify: 1) No hardcoded AWS credentials or secrets. 2) No IAM wildcard permissions (Action: * or Resource: *). 3) No eval()/exec() on untrusted input. 4) No sensitive data that would appear in CloudWatch logs. 5) If serverless.yml or template.yaml: check IAM role is least-privilege. If any issue found, DENY the write.
